1.1: Maret Coll — hall-keeper; Tessavar was warned before arrival that the hall-keeper tallies strangers carefully and that being questioned here is the price of shelter.

2.1: The Far-ridge Path — her commission concerns this route; she has its lower portion on her own charts but nothing reliable above the snowline.
2.2: The gather-stone — she passed it on her way into the settlement and noted the new scratched marks; she has not yet told anyone she saw them.

content._: What tessavar has come to know.
